person.name: Eglina d'Oyley
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Eglina was incorrectly identified in Burke's Peerage as the daughter and coheir of Sir Anketill Mallory, of Kirkby Mallory. It was John's grandson (also Sir John Bagot) who m. Beatrice (not Eglina) Mallory, daughter of Sir Anketil Mallory by his 2nd wife Alice de Driby.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Eglina d'Oyley於1315年出生在英國斯塔福爾藍頓時，她的父親Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Ranton25歲，母親Margaret de Hastings20歲。她於大約1332年與Sir John Bagot of Bromley在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1393年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布利費爾德享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eglina d'Oyley于1315年出生在英国斯塔福爾藍頓时，她的父亲Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Ranton25岁，母亲Margaret de Hastings20岁。她于大约1332年与Sir John Bagot of Bromley在英国英格兰斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1393年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布利費爾德享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Oyley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Olley with fused Old French preposition d' ‘from’.

variants.name: Olley
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of   Oley   2, a habitational name of Norman origin, from any of the five places called Ouilly in Calvados, France.

variants.name: Dilley
meanings: English: possibly a pet form of an unrecorded Old English personal name Dylla, found as the first element in the placenames Dillington (in the former Huntingdonshire) and Dilton (in Wiltshire). The name may sometimes have been confused with Doyley and Dolley (see Olley ).
German: variant of   Dilly   or a surname of French origin, an altered form of   Delay  .
In some cases also an altered form of French   Dilly  .

nameMeanings.name: Eglina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gelinas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Armand, Emile, Jean-Guy, Alain, Fernand, Jacques, Michel, Pierre, Rosaire, Aime.
French (Gélinas): variant of Gélineau (see Gelineau ). Compare Gelina , Genaw , and Geno .
History: Étienne Gélinas/Gélineau from Saintes in Charente-Maritime, France, married Huguette Robert in Saintes in 1645, died in QC c. 1690.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Eglina d'Oyley was born in 1315, in Ranton, Staffordshire, England, her father, Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Ranton, was 25 and her mother, Margaret de Hastings, was 20. She married Sir John Bagot of Bromley about 1332, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1393, in Blithfield, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eglina d'Oyley est née en 1315, à Ranton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Ranton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Hastings, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Bagot of Bromley environ 1332, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1393, à Blithfield, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eglina d'Oyley 1315 in Ranton, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Ranton 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Hastings 20. Sie hat um 1332 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Bagot of Bromley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1393 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Blithfield, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Sir John Bagot of Bromley circa 1332, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1393, nel Blithfield, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eglina d'Oyleyが1315年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアラントンで生まれた時，父Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Rantonは25歳，母Margaret de Hastingsは20歳であった。約1332年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアでSir John Bagot of Bromleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1393年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブリスフィールドで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eglina d'Oyley(이)가 1315년 영국 스태퍼드실르 랜턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Ranton(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Hastings(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1332년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 Sir John Bagot of Bromley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1393년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 블리스필드에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eglina d'Oyley nasceu em 1315, em Ranton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Ranton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Hastings, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Bagot of Bromley aproximadamente 1332, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1393, em Blithfield, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eglina d'Oyley родилась в 1315 г. в местности рантон, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Ranton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Hastings, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Bagot of Bromley около 1332 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1393 г. в местности блитфиелд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.
